template: Retrieve all Organization Units that own {Business_Function} capabilities and compute the average number of Actor assignments per unit.
description: Query metamodel Organization_Unit→Business_Function ownership, then compute actor distribution

template: Fetch the Technology Components supporting {Information_System_Service} and compute the technology stack age risk score.
description: Retrieve Technology_Component→IS_Service mapping then compute age-based risk

template: Retrieve all Gaps identified during Phase B for {Business_Architecture_domain} and compute the overall transformation complexity score.
description: Query Gap entities from Business Architecture then compute complexity metric

template: Get all Work Packages in the Architecture Roadmap and compute the critical path duration.
description: Retrieve Work_Package entities then compute critical path via graph analysis

template: Retrieve the Plateau definitions from the Architecture Roadmap and compute the resource utilization across transition stages.
description: Query Plateau→Work_Package assignments then compute resource distribution

template: Parse the ArchiMate model and compute the coupling score between {Application_Component} elements based on Serving and Flow relationships.
description: Extract ArchiMate elements/relationships then compute coupling via graph metrics

template: List all Business Process elements in the ArchiMate model and compute the centrality of each based on Triggering relationships.
description: Parse ArchiMate model, filter Business_Process, compute betweenness centrality

template: Retrieve the Application Components from the ArchiMate model and compute the modularity score of the application landscape.
description: Parse ArchiMate Application_Component elements then compute modularity via community detection

template: Fetch Principle definitions from the Architecture Repository and compute the coverage score against {stakeholder_concern} requirements.
description: Retrieve Principle and Requirement entities then compute coverage percentage

template: Retrieve all Data Entities associated with {Application_Component} and compute the data ownership concentration index.
description: Query Data_Entity→Application_Component mapping then compute Herfindahl index

template: Extract the dependency graph from the ArchiMate model and compute the maximum dependency depth from Technology to Strategy layer.
description: Parse ArchiMate model to graph, compute dependency depth across layers

template: Retrieve all Constraints from the Architecture Requirements Specification and compute the constraint conflict density score.
description: Query Constraint entities then compute pairwise conflict density

template: Parse ArchiMate model views and compute the element reuse ratio — how many elements appear in multiple views.
description: Extract elements per view then compute reuse ratio

template: Retrieve the Capability Assessment from Phase A and compute the maturity heat-map scores per business domain.
description: Query Capability entities with maturity levels then compute domain aggregations

template: Get all Location entities in the Content Metamodel and compute the geographic distribution entropy of Technology_Components.
description: Retrieve Location→Technology_Component then compute Shannon entropy

template: Retrieve ArchiMate Motivation elements (Stakeholder, Driver, Assessment, Goal) and compute the goal-to-driver traceability completeness.
description: Parse Motivation layer elements then compute traceability coverage

template: Fetch all IS_Service entities and their supporting Logical_Application_Components, then compute the redundancy ratio.
description: Query IS_Service→Logical_Application_Component then compute service redundancy

template: Retrieve Architecture Compliance review findings and compute the compliance score trend across review cycles.
description: Query compliance findings then compute temporal trend

template: Get the Process/Event/Control/Product catalog from Phase B and compute the automation coverage percentage.
description: Retrieve TOGAF catalog artifacts then compute automation metric

template: Extract all Composition and Aggregation relationships from the ArchiMate model and compute the structural complexity index.
description: Parse structural relationships then compute complexity via graph density

template: Retrieve Contract entities governing {IS_Service} and compute the SLA compliance margin.
description: Query Contract→IS_Service mapping then compute SLA gap

template: Parse the ArchiMate model and compute the layer-crossing count for each element.
description: Extract elements and relationships then compute cross-layer interactions

template: Retrieve all Building_Block definitions (ABBs and SBBs) and compute the reuse factor across projects.
description: Query Architecture/Solution Building Blocks then compute reuse metric

template: Get Technology_Component lifecycle data and compute the technical debt score based on end-of-life proximity.
description: Retrieve technology lifecycle metadata then compute debt score

template: Retrieve all Function entities and their Measure_of_Effectiveness and compute the value-delivery alignment score.
description: Query Function→Measure mapping then compute alignment metric

template: Find all Actors who participate in {Business_Service}, then find the Organization Units those Actors belong to, then list the Locations of those units.
description: 3-hop: Actor→Business_Service, Actor→Organization_Unit, Organization_Unit→Location

template: Start from {Goal} in the Motivation layer, find the Requirements that realize it, then find the Constraints that restrict those Requirements.
description: 3-hop through ArchiMate Motivation: Goal→Requirement→Constraint

template: Given Architecture Principle '{principle_name}', find which Architecture Requirements reference it, then find which Gaps exist for those requirements.
description: 2-hop: Principle→Requirement→Gap through Content Metamodel

template: Find all Application Components that realize {Business_Function}, then find the Technology Components they are deployed on, then get the Locations.
description: 3-hop: Application_Component→Business_Function, then Technology deployment, then Location

template: Retrieve {deliverable} from Phase B, then find all Artifacts it contains, then list the catalog/matrix/diagram type of each.
description: 3-hop: Deliverable→Artifact→type classification per TOGAF

template: Find the Stakeholders concerned with {Architecture_Viewpoint}, then retrieve their Concerns, then find related Architecture Views.
description: 3-hop: Viewpoint→Stakeholder→Concern→View

template: Start from ArchiMate {Business_Object}, traverse Realization relationships to Data Objects, then traverse Access relationships to Application Components.
description: 3-hop ArchiMate: Business_Object→(Realization)→Data_Object→(Access)→Application_Component

template: Find all Work Packages in the Implementation and Migration Plan, then find which Plateaus they target, then list affected Building Blocks.
description: 3-hop: Work_Package→Plateau→Building_Block per ADM Phase F

template: Retrieve the Architecture Definition Document, find the Business Architecture section's catalogs, then get all entities in those catalogs.
description: 3-hop: ADD→Business catalogs→entity list

template: Find ArchiMate elements of type {Resource} in the Strategy layer, follow Assignment relationships to Capabilities, then find Courses of Action.
description: 3-hop ArchiMate Strategy: Resource→Capability→Course_of_Action

template: Given {Technology_Service}, find which Infrastructure Interfaces expose it, then find the Application Platform Services that consume it.
description: 2-hop: Technology_Service→Infrastructure_Interface→Application_Platform_Service

template: Find all Business Processes in the ArchiMate model that trigger {Business_Event}, then find the Roles assigned to those processes.
description: 2-hop ArchiMate: Business_Event→(Triggering)→Business_Process→(Assignment)→Business_Role

template: Retrieve all Architecture Requirements from the Specification, find which ones trace to Gaps, then find the Work Packages that address those Gaps.
description: 3-hop: Requirement→Gap→Work_Package through Content Metamodel

template: Start from {Plateau} in the roadmap, find all Architecture Building Blocks in that plateau, then find their Solution Building Block implementations.
description: 2-hop: Plateau→ABB→SBB per Content Metamodel

template: Find all Application Interfaces in the ArchiMate model, then find which Application Collaborations use them, then identify cross-domain data flows.
description: 3-hop ArchiMate: Application_Interface→Application_Collaboration→data flow analysis

template: Retrieve the Statement of Architecture Work, find the approved scope boundaries, then list all ADM phases affected by scope constraints.
description: 2-hop: Statement_of_Arch_Work→scope→phase mapping

template: Find all Driver elements in the ArchiMate Motivation layer, follow Influence relationships to Assessments, then find connected Stakeholders.
description: 3-hop ArchiMate Motivation: Driver→Assessment→Stakeholder

template: Given a Logical Technology Component, find its Physical Technology Component deployments, then find the Locations where they are deployed.
description: 2-hop Content Metamodel: Logical_TC→Physical_TC→Location

template: Find all views in the ArchiMate model, for each view find which viewpoint it conforms to, then retrieve the viewpoint's modeling conventions.
description: 3-hop: View→Viewpoint→conventions per ArchiMate 3.2

template: Start from {Capability} in the Business Architecture, find the Value Streams it contributes to, then find the Stakeholders who benefit.
description: 3-hop: Capability→Value_Stream→Stakeholder

template: Find all Serving relationships in the ArchiMate model, then for each serving pair find if there is also a Flow relationship, identifying bidirectional service patterns.
description: 2-hop ArchiMate relationship analysis: Serving + Flow co-occurrence

template: Retrieve the Architecture Requirements Specification, find all functional requirements, then find the Architecture Building Blocks that satisfy them.
description: 3-hop: ARS→functional requirements→ABB realization

template: Find all Implementation and Migration Architecture elements, follow their Association to Plateau elements, then find the related Deliverables.
description: 3-hop ArchiMate I&M layer: Implementation_Event→Plateau→Deliverable

template: Find the Business Interaction elements in ArchiMate, trace to participating Business Roles, then find the Business Actors assigned to those roles.
description: 3-hop ArchiMate: Business_Interaction→Business_Role→Business_Actor

template: Given Phase E Opportunities and Solutions output, find all candidate Solution Building Blocks, trace to their Architecture Building Block abstractions, then find related standards.
description: 3-hop: Phase_E→SBB→ABB→Standard

template: Compare the Baseline and Target Business Architectures for {business_domain} and recommend the optimal migration sequence.
description: Baseline vs Target Business Architecture comparison per Phase B

template: Compare two candidate Solution Building Blocks for {IS_Service}: evaluate technology maturity, cost, and standards compliance.
description: SBB comparison against Architecture Building Block requirements

template: Compare the ArchiMate model's Application Landscape before and after merging {Application_Component_A} and {Application_Component_B}.
description: Pre/post merge analysis via graph topology comparison

template: Evaluate three implementation approaches for {Gap}: in-house build, COTS procurement, and cloud SaaS — using the Architecture Decision Record framework.
description: Three-way comparison per TOGAF Architecture Decision Record

template: Compare two candidate Architecture Principles for governing {architecture_domain} and assess their impact on existing Building Blocks.
description: Principle impact comparison on Building Block portfolio

template: Compare the centrality scores of {Application_Component_A} vs {Application_Component_B} in the ArchiMate dependency graph to decide which is more critical.
description: Graph centrality comparison for architecture criticality assessment

template: Evaluate whether to decompose or consolidate {Business_Service} based on coupling metrics and stakeholder impact.
description: Decomposition vs consolidation decision using graph modularity

template: Compare two candidate Architecture Viewpoints for communicating {concern} to {stakeholder_group} and recommend the most effective one.
description: Viewpoint comparison per stakeholder concern mapping

template: Evaluate two Plateau transition sequences in the roadmap and recommend based on risk and value delivery.
description: Plateau sequence comparison per Phase F criteria

template: Compare integration patterns (point-to-point vs ESB vs event-driven) for connecting {Application_Component} to {Technology_Service}.
description: Integration pattern comparison using ArchiMate relationship analysis

template: Compare the modularity scores of the current vs proposed Application Architecture using graph community detection.
description: Modularity comparison via graph analysis pre/post refactoring

template: Evaluate two competing standards for {technology_domain} against the Standards Information Base and recommend adoption.
description: Standards comparison against TOGAF Standards Information Base

template: Compare the stakeholder impact of two Work Package sequencing options in the Implementation and Migration Plan.
description: Work Package ordering comparison per stakeholder impact

template: Compare Capability maturity assessments across {org_unit_A} and {org_unit_B} and identify capability sharing opportunities.
description: Cross-unit Capability maturity comparison per Phase A assessment

template: Evaluate whether an ArchiMate Grouping or Plateau element better represents the target state transition for {migration_scenario}.
description: ArchiMate modeling decision: Grouping vs Plateau element usage

template: Compare two candidate Data Architecture patterns (centralized vs federated) for {Business_Function} using data entity dependency analysis.
description: Data Architecture pattern comparison per Phase C

template: Evaluate the trade-offs between Realization vs Serving relationships for modeling {Application_Component} to {Business_Service} in ArchiMate.
description: ArchiMate relationship type decision based on semantics

template: Compare Architecture Governance board structures: centralized vs federated model for {enterprise_scope}.
description: Governance model comparison per TOGAF Phase H

template: Evaluate two Technology Component alternatives for hosting {Physical_Application_Component}: on-premise vs cloud-native.
description: Technology hosting decision using Technology Architecture analysis

template: Compare risk profiles of two migration paths: big-bang vs incremental transition for {Architecture_Landscape} transformation.
description: Migration strategy comparison per Phase E/F risk assessment

template: Perform gap analysis between Baseline and Target Business Architecture: identify eliminated, replaced, new, and retained Business Functions.
description: Full gap analysis matrix per TOGAF technique for Business Functions

template: Identify gaps between current Application Components and the target Application Portfolio — classify each as eliminate, replace, re-engineer, or retain.
description: Application landscape gap analysis per Phase C

template: Compare Baseline and Target Data Entity models and identify data gaps, redundancies, and new data requirements.
description: Data Architecture gap analysis per Content Metamodel

template: Analyze the Technology Architecture gap between current Technology Components and target platform requirements.
description: Technology Architecture gap analysis per Phase D

template: Identify Capability gaps by comparing the current Capability Assessment (Phase A) against target Capability model.
description: Capability gap analysis across maturity levels

template: Perform ArchiMate model gap analysis: find elements in Target that have no Baseline counterpart and vice versa.
description: ArchiMate element-level gap analysis between model versions

template: Identify gaps between Architecture Principles and their implementation in Solution Building Blocks.
description: Principle-to-implementation gap analysis

template: Analyze gaps between the Standards Information Base requirements and actual Technology Component standards compliance.
description: Standards compliance gap analysis per Architecture Governance

template: Identify stakeholder coverage gaps: which Stakeholders from the Stakeholder Map have no associated Architecture Viewpoints?
description: Stakeholder-to-viewpoint coverage gap analysis

template: Perform security architecture gap analysis between current and target states using the ArchiMate model's technology layer.
description: Security-focused gap analysis in Technology Architecture

template: Identify missing Realization relationships in the ArchiMate model where Business Processes have no supporting Application Services.
description: Cross-layer realization gap detection via relationship analysis

template: Find gaps in the Architecture Requirements Specification where Requirements have no traced Building Block implementations.
description: Requirements traceability gap analysis per Content Metamodel

template: Identify Value Stream stages with no associated Capability and flag as capability gaps requiring investment.
description: Value Stream to Capability mapping gap analysis

template: Analyze ArchiMate model for orphaned elements — nodes with no relationships — and classify them as gaps or modeling errors.
description: Orphan element detection via graph connectivity analysis

template: Identify Integration Architecture gaps where Application Components interact but have no defined Application Interface.
description: Interface gap detection using ArchiMate relationship patterns

template: Compare deliverable completeness: which TOGAF deliverables required by Phase B are incomplete or missing in the Architecture Repository?
description: Deliverable completeness gap per ADM phase requirements

template: Find Organization Units that own Business Functions but lack assigned Actors — an organizational staffing gap.
description: Organizational assignment gap via Content Metamodel traversal

template: Identify ArchiMate Implementation & Migration elements (Work Package, Deliverable, Plateau) that are disconnected from the Architecture layer.
description: Implementation planning gap via graph connectivity

template: Perform catalog completeness analysis: which Content Metamodel entity types have zero entries in the Architecture Repository?
description: Repository completeness gap per metamodel entity types

template: Identify gaps between TOGAF Architecture Viewpoint definitions and the actual Views created in the ArchiMate model.
description: Viewpoint-to-view realization gap analysis

template: Aggregate all ArchiMate elements by layer (Strategy, Business, Application, Technology, Physical, Implementation) and report element counts per layer.
description: Element distribution aggregation across ArchiMate layers

template: Summarize the Architecture Roadmap: count Work Packages per Plateau and total effort estimates.
description: Roadmap summary aggregation per Phase F output

template: Aggregate all Content Metamodel entities across Business, Data, Application, and Technology domains and report repository completeness.
description: Cross-domain metamodel entity count aggregation

template: Summarize Architecture Compliance findings: group by severity, count per domain, identify top-3 recurring issues.
description: Compliance findings aggregation per Architecture Governance

template: Aggregate ArchiMate relationship counts by type (Composition, Aggregation, Assignment, Realization, Serving, Access, Influence, Triggering, Flow, Specialization, Association).
description: Relationship type distribution aggregation from ArchiMate model

template: Summarize stakeholder concerns: aggregate all Concerns by Stakeholder group and identify the most frequently cited concerns.
description: Stakeholder concern aggregation per Architecture Vision

template: Aggregate Gap entities from all four ADM architecture phases (B, C-Data, C-App, D) and classify by gap type.
description: Cross-phase gap aggregation for transition planning

template: Summarize the Architecture Building Block portfolio: count ABBs per domain, identify domains with lowest coverage.
description: ABB portfolio coverage aggregation

template: Aggregate all ArchiMate viewpoints used in the model and report which of the 24 example viewpoints are actually instantiated.
description: Viewpoint usage aggregation against ArchiMate 3.2 Appendix C

template: Summarize the Standards Information Base: count standards per technology domain and identify standard expiry timelines.
description: Standards portfolio aggregation per Architecture Governance

template: Aggregate graph topology metrics from the ArchiMate model: node count, edge count, density, average degree, diameter.
description: Model-wide graph metric aggregation via NetworkX analysis

template: Summarize TOGAF deliverable status across all ADM phases: count completed, in-progress, and not-started per phase.
description: ADM deliverable status aggregation

template: Aggregate Actor-to-Role assignments from the ArchiMate model and identify actors with the most diverse role portfolio.
description: Actor-Role assignment aggregation via ArchiMate relationships

template: Summarize the Architecture Contract terms: aggregate contracts by type (business, technology, data) and compliance status.
description: Architecture Contract portfolio aggregation per Phase G

template: Aggregate all ArchiMate views by viewpoint type and report the average number of elements per view.
description: View complexity aggregation across viewpoint types

template: Collect all Requirement entities and aggregate by priority and status across architecture domains.
description: Requirements portfolio aggregation per ARS

template: Summarize the Application Portfolio: aggregate Application Components by lifecycle status (planned, active, retiring, retired).
description: Application lifecycle status aggregation

template: Aggregate ArchiMate Motivation layer: count Goals, Principles, Requirements, and Constraints and compute the ratio of constraints to goals.
description: Motivation layer element aggregation and ratio computation

template: Summarize cross-reference matrices from Phase B: aggregate Business Service/Function matrix coverage percentages.
description: Matrix coverage aggregation per TOGAF artifact types

template: Aggregate the total number of architecture artifacts (catalogs, matrices, diagrams) produced per ADM phase.
description: Artifact production aggregation across ADM cycle

template: Check whether {Application_Component} complies with all Architecture Principles defined in the Architecture Repository.
description: Principle compliance check for specific Application Component

template: Validate ArchiMate model relationships: check that all Composition relationships are between elements of the same layer per ArchiMate 3.2 rules.
description: ArchiMate relationship validity check per specification rules

template: Check whether the Architecture Definition Document contains all required sections per TOGAF Standard deliverable specification.
description: ADD completeness compliance check per TOGAF deliverable template

template: Verify that all Technology Components comply with the Standards Information Base — flag non-compliant components.
description: Technology standards compliance check per Architecture Governance

template: Check whether the Statement of Architecture Work covers all mandatory elements per TOGAF: scope, constraints, principles, budget, timeline.
description: SoAW completeness check per TOGAF deliverable specification

template: Validate that all ArchiMate Access relationships correctly use read/write/read-write modifiers per the specification.
description: ArchiMate Access relationship modifier validation

template: Check whether the Architecture Requirements Specification traces all requirements to at least one Principle, Gap, or Stakeholder Concern.
description: Requirements traceability compliance check

template: Verify that the Architecture Vision document addresses all stakeholder concerns identified in the Stakeholder Map.
description: Stakeholder concern coverage compliance per Phase A

template: Check that all ArchiMate Triggering relationships connect behavioral elements only, not structural elements.
description: ArchiMate Triggering relationship validity per spec constraints

template: Verify that each Architecture Building Block in the portfolio has at least one associated Solution Building Block.
description: ABB-to-SBB realization compliance check

template: Check that ArchiMate Influence relationships are used only with Motivation elements per specification rules.
description: ArchiMate Influence relationship constraint validation

template: Verify that the Architecture Roadmap includes all Gaps identified during phases B through D as Work Packages.
description: Gap-to-Work Package coverage compliance per Phase E/F

template: Check whether the ArchiMate model has any invalid cross-layer Serving relationships that skip intermediate layers.
description: Cross-layer relationship validity check via graph layer analysis

template: Verify that all Contracts in the Architecture Repository reference specific SLA metrics and have defined review dates.
description: Contract completeness compliance per Architecture Governance

template: Check that the Implementation and Migration Plan addresses all Architecture Requirements marked as 'must-have' priority.
description: Implementation plan requirements coverage compliance

template: Validate ArchiMate model naming conventions: check that elements follow the organization's naming standards.
description: Naming convention compliance check across ArchiMate model

template: Check that the Architecture Governance framework defines review points for each ADM phase as required by TOGAF.
description: Governance review point compliance per ADM cycle

template: Verify that all Data Entity definitions in the Content Metamodel include data owner, classification, and retention policy attributes.
description: Data governance attribute compliance per data architecture standards

template: Check that ArchiMate Specialization relationships are only used between elements of the same type per specification.
description: ArchiMate Specialization relationship type constraint validation

template: Verify that the Transition Architecture deliverable includes a complete mapping from current to target state for every affected Building Block.
description: Transition Architecture completeness compliance per Phase F

template: Assess the risk of {Application_Component} failure by analyzing its dependency graph — identify single points of failure via bridge detection.
description: Single point of failure risk via graph bridge detection

template: Evaluate technology obsolescence risk for all Technology Components approaching end-of-life within 24 months.
description: Technology lifecycle risk assessment per Phase D

template: Assess the migration risk for transitioning from {Plateau_A} to {Plateau_B}: identify affected stakeholders, data migration complexity, and rollback capability.
description: Plateau transition risk assessment per Phase F

template: Analyze the impact propagation if {Technology_Service} fails: trace through ArchiMate Serving relationships to identify affected Business Services.
description: Failure impact propagation analysis via graph traversal

template: Evaluate vendor lock-in risk for Technology Components: identify components with single-vendor dependency and no standard interfaces.
description: Vendor dependency risk assessment in Technology Architecture

template: Assess data sovereignty risk: identify Data Entities that cross Location boundaries per Content Metamodel Location→Data_Entity mapping.
description: Data sovereignty risk via Location-Data cross-referencing

template: Evaluate the risk of Architecture Principle violations: which Building Blocks are most likely to deviate from principles given their change frequency?
description: Principle violation risk assessment based on change history

template: Assess integration complexity risk: identify Application Components with the highest number of interfaces and Serving relationships.
description: Integration complexity risk via ArchiMate relationship degree analysis

template: Evaluate the risk to the Architecture Roadmap if {Work_Package} is delayed: compute schedule impact using critical path analysis.
description: Schedule risk via critical path impact of Work Package delay

template: Assess skill gap risk: identify Technology Components requiring specialized skills not currently available in Organization Units.
description: Skill gap risk per Organization Unit capability assessment

template: Evaluate the blast radius if ArchiMate element {element} is removed: compute impact score via graph traversal of all relationship types.
description: Element removal blast radius via graph impact propagation

template: Assess compliance risk: identify Architecture Requirements with no compliance verification plan in the Architecture Contract.
description: Requirements verification gap risk per Architecture Governance

template: Evaluate security risk exposure: identify Application Components with external-facing Interfaces that lack security controls in the model.
description: Security exposure risk via ArchiMate interface analysis

template: Assess portfolio concentration risk: identify Business Functions supported by only one Application Component with no redundancy.
description: Application support concentration risk analysis

template: Evaluate Architecture Decision risk: identify decisions with high reversibility cost and no documented alternatives.
description: Architecture decision reversibility risk assessment

template: Assess data quality risk: identify Data Entities with no defined data standards or validation rules in the metamodel.
description: Data quality governance risk per Data Architecture

template: Evaluate the risk of scope creep in the current ADM cycle by comparing approved Statement of Architecture Work scope against actual artifacts produced.
description: Scope adherence risk per ADM governance

template: Assess interoperability risk: identify Technology Components using non-standard protocols not listed in the Standards Information Base.
description: Interoperability standards compliance risk assessment

template: Evaluate change impact risk for modifying {Business_Process}: trace through ArchiMate relationships to all dependent elements across layers.
description: Change impact risk via multi-layer dependency traversal

template: Assess the risk of the Architecture Repository becoming stale: identify entities with last-modified dates exceeding governance review thresholds.
description: Repository staleness risk per Architecture Governance cycle

template: Given the Gaps from phases B-D, generate a candidate set of Work Packages and sequence them by dependency using topological sort.
description: Work Package generation and topological ordering per Phase E

template: Define Plateau transitions: group Work Packages into 3 transition architectures based on business value delivery milestones.
description: Plateau definition per Phase F transition architecture planning

template: Create a migration plan for retiring {legacy_system}: identify all dependent Application Components and plan their migration sequence.
description: Legacy system retirement planning via dependency analysis

template: Sequence Building Block implementations: determine the optimal order for deploying SBBs given ABB dependencies.
description: SBB deployment sequencing per ABB dependency graph

template: Plan the data migration roadmap: sequence Data Entity migrations based on Application Component dependencies.
description: Data migration sequencing per Data Architecture dependencies

template: Generate an Implementation Factor Assessment: catalog factors (risks, issues, assumptions, dependencies) for each Work Package.
description: Implementation factor cataloging per Phase E technique

template: Create a consolidated gaps, solutions, and dependencies matrix from the Architecture Roadmap for executive review.
description: Consolidated matrix per TOGAF Phase E deliverable

template: Plan the Architecture Contract negotiation sequence: identify which contracts need to be in place before each Work Package can begin.
description: Contract-Work Package prerequisite planning per Phase G

template: Sequence the deployment of ArchiMate Implementation & Migration elements to achieve incremental capability delivery.
description: Incremental deployment sequencing via I&M layer analysis

template: Plan a standards adoption roadmap: schedule transitions from current to target standards per the Standards Information Base.
description: Standards transition planning per Architecture Governance

template: Generate a resource allocation plan across Work Packages: identify skill requirements and map to available Organization Unit capabilities.
description: Resource planning per Work Package skill requirements

template: Plan the stakeholder communication schedule per ADM phase: which Architecture Views should be presented to which stakeholders at each phase gate.
description: Stakeholder communication planning per TOGAF Communications Plan

template: Create an architecture maturity roadmap: define target maturity levels per Capability and sequence improvement initiatives.
description: Capability maturity improvement roadmap planning

template: Plan the Technology Component refresh cycle: schedule replacements based on end-of-life dates, dependency impact, and budget constraints.
description: Technology refresh planning per Phase D and Phase E

template: Sequence Architecture Governance reviews: plan review board meetings aligned with Work Package milestones and Plateau transitions.
description: Governance review scheduling per Architecture Governance framework

template: Plan the ArchiMate model evolution: define modeling milestones aligned with ADM phase completions.
description: ArchiMate model update planning per ADM cycle

template: Generate a Business Transformation Readiness Assessment and plan readiness improvement activities per readiness factor.
description: Transformation readiness planning per TOGAF Phase A technique

template: Plan the integration architecture roadmap: sequence interface deployments based on Application Component migration order.
description: Integration roadmap per Application Architecture dependencies

template: Create a value realization plan: map Work Package completions to measurable business outcome KPIs per Architecture Vision.
description: Value realization tracking plan per Phase A KPIs

template: Plan the Architecture Repository population strategy: sequence which Content Metamodel entity types to populate first based on dependency order.
description: Repository population sequencing per metamodel dependencies

template: Sequence Principle implementation: determine which Architecture Principles should be enforced first based on risk reduction impact.
description: Principle enforcement priority planning

template: Plan a multi-project Architecture Roadmap: resolve cross-project Work Package dependencies and identify shared Building Blocks.
description: Multi-project roadmap coordination per Phase F

template: Generate phase-gate criteria for each Plateau transition: define the mandatory deliverables and compliance checks required.
description: Phase-gate criteria definition per ADM governance

template: Plan the training and organizational change roadmap: align capability building activities with Work Package deployment schedule.
description: Organizational change management planning per Phase F

template: Create an Architecture Decision Log roadmap: identify when key architecture decisions must be made relative to Work Package dependencies.
description: Decision timing planning per Architecture Roadmap dependencies

template: Identify all Stakeholders affected by changes to {Business_Service} and classify their concerns by TOGAF concern category.
description: Stakeholder identification via Business Service impact analysis

template: Map Stakeholders to Architecture Viewpoints: for each stakeholder group, determine which TOGAF viewpoints address their concerns.
description: Stakeholder-Viewpoint mapping per TOGAF stakeholder management

template: Analyze the ArchiMate Stakeholder elements and their Influence/Association relationships to Driver elements to identify key decision-makers.
description: Decision-maker identification via ArchiMate Motivation layer analysis

template: Build a stakeholder power-interest grid: classify all identified stakeholders by influence level and interest in {architecture_change}.
description: Power-interest matrix construction per stakeholder analysis technique

template: Identify stakeholders who are impacted by Work Packages in {Plateau} transition and assess their change readiness.
description: Plateau stakeholder impact and readiness assessment

template: Analyze the Communication Plan: which stakeholders receive which Architecture Views and is the coverage complete?
description: Communication plan coverage analysis per Phase A deliverable

template: Identify conflicting stakeholder concerns for {Architecture_Decision} and recommend a resolution approach.
description: Stakeholder concern conflict resolution per TOGAF technique

template: Map ArchiMate Business Actors and Business Roles to TOGAF Stakeholder categories and identify coverage gaps.
description: ArchiMate-to-TOGAF stakeholder mapping and gap identification

template: Analyze stakeholder engagement levels across ADM phases: identify phases where stakeholder participation drops.
description: Stakeholder engagement trend analysis across ADM cycle

template: Identify the stakeholders who should approve the Architecture Contract for {Work_Package} based on their concerns and authority.
description: Contract approval stakeholder identification per Phase G

template: Analyze the impact of proposed Architecture Principle changes on each stakeholder group and prioritize communication.
description: Principle change stakeholder impact analysis

template: Build a RACI matrix for Architecture Governance activities: map Stakeholders to governance roles (Responsible, Accountable, Consulted, Informed).
description: Governance RACI matrix construction per Architecture Governance

template: Identify stakeholders for the Architecture Board and assess their suitability based on domain expertise and organizational authority.
description: Architecture Board member identification per TOGAF governance

template: Analyze how stakeholder concerns evolve from Phase A (Architecture Vision) through Phase F (Migration Planning) for {stakeholder_group}.
description: Stakeholder concern evolution analysis across ADM phases

template: Map the influence network: which ArchiMate Stakeholder elements influence which Goal and Requirement elements, and what is the influence topology?
description: Stakeholder influence network analysis via graph topology

template: Identify external stakeholders (regulators, partners, customers) from the ArchiMate model and map their concerns to Compliance Requirements.
description: External stakeholder compliance concern mapping

template: Assess stakeholder satisfaction risk: identify stakeholders whose key concerns are not addressed by any Work Package in the Architecture Roadmap.
description: Stakeholder concern coverage risk in Architecture Roadmap

template: Analyze the Organization Map: which Organization Units are most affected by the proposed architecture changes and who leads them?
description: Organizational impact analysis per TOGAF Organization Map

template: Build a viewpoint recommendation matrix: for each stakeholder concern, recommend the most appropriate ArchiMate viewpoint from Appendix C.
description: ArchiMate viewpoint recommendation per stakeholder concern

template: Identify the minimum set of Architecture Views needed to address all stakeholder concerns with no redundancy.
description: Optimal view set computation via set cover analysis

template: Calculate the total cost of ownership for {Application_Component}: sum infrastructure, license, support, and operational costs from Technology Components.
description: TCO computation via Application→Technology cost aggregation

template: Compute the ROI of implementing {Architecture_Building_Block}: estimate cost of SBB alternatives vs. value of capability enablement.
description: ABB implementation ROI per building block portfolio analysis

template: Assess the cost of Gap remediation: estimate effort for each Gap entity based on affected entity count and complexity score.
description: Gap remediation cost estimation per Phase E planning

template: Calculate the business value impact of completing {Plateau}: aggregate the value of all Work Packages in the plateau transition.
description: Plateau business value computation per Phase F

template: Compute the cost of technical debt remediation: estimate cost per Technology Component based on age, compliance gaps, and dependency count.
description: Technical debt cost estimation per Technology Architecture analysis

template: Evaluate the cost-benefit of consolidating {count} Application Components into a single platform using ArchiMate model metrics.
description: Application consolidation cost-benefit via graph simplification analysis

template: Calculate the standards compliance cost: estimate effort to bring non-compliant Technology Components up to Standards Information Base requirements.
description: Standards compliance cost per technology portfolio gap

template: Assess the value of Architecture Repository maturity: estimate productivity gains from improving repository completeness per Content Metamodel.
description: Repository maturity value estimation

template: Compute the risk-adjusted cost of {Work_Package}: factor in probability of risk events and their financial impact.
description: Risk-adjusted Work Package costing per Phase E

template: Calculate the integration cost savings from adopting a shared {Technology_Service} across multiple Application Components.
description: Shared service cost savings via ArchiMate Serving relationship analysis

template: Assess the opportunity cost of delaying {Work_Package}: compute business value foregone per month of delay.
description: Delay opportunity cost per Architecture Roadmap schedule

template: Calculate the cost of maintaining redundant Application Components vs. consolidation cost using ArchiMate model analysis.
description: Redundancy maintenance vs consolidation cost comparison

template: Estimate the governance overhead cost: compute the resource requirement for Architecture Compliance reviews per ADM cycle.
description: Governance resource cost estimation per TOGAF governance framework

template: Compute the value of reducing application landscape complexity: estimate operational savings from lowering graph density metrics.
description: Complexity reduction value via graph metric improvement estimation

template: Assess the business case for adopting {standard}: estimate compliance cost vs. interoperability value.
description: Standard adoption business case per Standards Information Base

template: Calculate the training cost for organizational change required by {Plateau} transition: estimate per Organization Unit.
description: Organizational change training cost per Plateau

template: Compute the value-at-risk if the Architecture Roadmap is executed without addressing identified high-priority Gaps.
description: Gap non-remediation value-at-risk computation

template: Assess the cost impact of an Architecture Principle change: estimate rework cost across affected Building Blocks.
description: Principle change rework cost estimation

template: Calculate the expected value delivery per ADM iteration: aggregate value across all Work Packages weighted by completion probability.
description: ADM iteration expected value computation

template: Estimate the cost-benefit of creating additional ArchiMate views: model the effort cost vs. stakeholder decision-making value improvement.
description: ArchiMate view creation cost-benefit assessment

template: Perform a full Architecture Landscape assessment: parse the ArchiMate model, compute topology metrics, identify critical components via centrality, and generate a risk heat-map.
description: Full landscape assessment: parse → metrics → centrality → risk scoring

template: Execute an end-to-end ADM Phase B cycle: retrieve Business Architecture inputs, identify stakeholders, perform gap analysis, generate roadmap components, and validate compliance.
description: Complete Phase B workflow simulation

template: Conduct a Technology Architecture rationalization: parse current ArchiMate model, compute redundancy metrics, identify consolidation candidates, assess migration risk, and plan sequencing.
description: Full technology rationalization workflow

template: Build a complete Stakeholder Management Package: identify stakeholders, map concerns to viewpoints, select ArchiMate views, build communication plan, and assess engagement risk.
description: End-to-end stakeholder management workflow per TOGAF

template: Execute a full gap-to-roadmap pipeline: aggregate Gaps from all architecture phases, generate Work Packages, compute dependencies, sequence via topological sort, and define Plateaus.
description: Complete Phase E pipeline: gaps → work packages → dependencies → plateaus

template: Perform a cross-model consistency check: validate ArchiMate model against TOGAF Content Metamodel, check relationship rules, verify viewpoint conformance, and generate compliance report.
description: Full cross-specification consistency validation

template: Conduct an Application Portfolio assessment: retrieve all Application Components, compute coupling/cohesion metrics, identify candidates for elimination/consolidation/retention, and estimate migration costs.
description: Complete application portfolio rationalization workflow

template: Build an Architecture Decision Record: retrieve alternatives, analyze trade-offs using graph impact analysis, assess stakeholder concerns, compute cost-benefit, and document the decision.
description: End-to-end architecture decision process

template: Perform an enterprise-wide dependency audit: parse ArchiMate model, extract full dependency graph, compute layer-crossing metrics, identify circular dependencies, and generate remediation plan.
description: Full dependency audit from model parsing to remediation

template: Execute Architecture Governance review: check deliverable completeness across ADM phases, validate principle compliance, assess risk posture, review contract status, and generate board report.
description: Complete governance review cycle per TOGAF Phase H

template: Conduct a Business-IT alignment assessment: map Business Functions to Application Services via ArchiMate, compute alignment scores, identify misalignments, and recommend corrective actions.
description: Business-IT alignment assessment workflow

template: Build a Transition Architecture: retrieve target state, define intermediate plateaus, assign Work Packages, validate constraints, and compute critical path.
description: Complete Transition Architecture construction per Phase F

template: Perform a Value Stream analysis: map Value Stream stages to Capabilities, assess maturity, identify investment priorities, compute expected value improvement, and generate roadmap.
description: End-to-end Value Stream to investment roadmap

template: Execute a Security Architecture assessment: identify external-facing elements in ArchiMate, trace data flows through the model, assess vulnerability exposure per Technology Component, and plan mitigations.
description: Security architecture assessment via ArchiMate model analysis

template: Conduct a full Architecture Repository health check: assess completeness per Content Metamodel type, check for stale entries, validate cross-references, compute overall health score, and generate improvement plan.
description: Complete Architecture Repository health assessment
